series_metadata.series_description: ISTV''s issued to State of Ohio agencies in order to pay licensing fees owed to the Board of Pharmacy.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Paper copies to be retained in the fiscal office for a period of (1) year then transferred offsite for (1) year then shred. ; Electronic: Electronic copies are stored on the State of Ohio OAKS FIN database indefinitely, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Permanent
